items.title: Edward Church, Peter Hujar, Looted Art
items.summary: Who is the antiquities dealer behind looted artifacts at dozens of museums across the United States?

items.title: A Living Memorial to Palestinian Activist Alex Odeh Takes Flight
items.summary: "The Stolen Dove" is a participatory project that turns a decades-old monument into an artwork to keep the scholar and civil rights leader’s memory alive.

items.title: Trevor Winkfield’s Cheerfully Sinister Worlds
items.summary: His rejection of certainty is an urgent reminder that imagination should not be neglected in the pursuit of art.

items.title: Man Sentenced to 20 Years for Fatally Stabbing NYC Vogue Dancer
items.summary: Dmitriy Popov killed the Black gay dancer O'Shae Sibley at a Brooklyn gas station in 2023 in a homophobic hate crime.
